["Hey pumpers! We decided to take the weekend off from pumping!

In the meantime, we're working on expanding our community to achieve bigger pumps again. So go ahead and join our brand new Dicord Server: 

", {'type': 'link', 'text': 'dsc.gg/legitpancakepumps'}]
We are happy to answer any question regarding pumps and how to profit more from them!
Chat opend at 14.20 what a Chad
Maybe we can do a nice giveaway to our pump participants 🍀
Hey guys
Everybody's sleeping
It seems so
Many of our members are based in North America. Good morning to everybody reading this!

Good morning , I have a question.
I live in Pakistan , Every time you post a pump announcement I buy at the same time , but in the next second the coin dumped , Everytime it happens to me , I dont known why this happens , Can any one help me
Lol
Because they buy in before they release the name then leave you holding
Pay to play
Yes they create contract .. send between themselves and dump on members after high price
Nope that’s not true. We have only a couple seconds to get in ourselves. You can see the buy in times on bsc scan.
But yeah, that's definitely how other pump groups work!
Who knows really
Yes I have seen other pump groups like this.. and I think this group is same 😂😂
We generally use antibot tokens and keep the token address unknown until the pump. You can see than in all our pumps the token is bought after the announcement.
The timings and holders are listed on BSC scan. If your sceptical feel free to look after our next few pumps
Yes that's true.. I looked.up and first buy is exact time of pump
We do understand your concern and it definitely requieres fast fingers to do all the transactions and approvals quickly.
Will Check it out
We have thought of using tokens with a max amount of selling to prevent the price from dumping but we are not sure of how the community will take this. What do you all think?
Yes I am in almost all pump groups ... They claim 100x but prepump is there
Yeah a lot of groups prepump.
When next pump
Probably on Monday! We'll be posting a poll regarding the pump time
If there's anyone else with questions, please feel free to ask!
Which coin will pump today??
Hi Thomas! We don't have a pump today. Our next pump is on Monday.
Ok thanks...
sleep first wake up monday 🤭
Exactly! 🚀
Hi guys
Why i cant withdrawl a coin after a pump?
Anyone can help me?
How long after the pump are you trying to withdraw
One day
They will remove liquidity
thats why u cant withdraw coin
And how this happened?
That was my first pump
Some tips?
only one tip : Be extremely fast... buy fast.. sell fast
And this will happen with all the coins pumped?
Or Only the new ones
with some coins only if devs decided to discontinue the token
We pump our own created tokens, so yes we do remove liquidity, but only after a few days. Remember, it's a pump & dump, so you should always sell your tokens after a few minutes
Iin few days its ok but in 24h noo
Some.devs remove liquidity within hours of the pump
We lock them for 2 days usually but if we can revise our policy to prevent this! Let us know what token you bought and your public address and we will see how to help you :)
Admin you know today is big pump by 15 groups ?
Who
No we don't know
Ok
